candidate_action: S_BHSM = S_boundary_geometry + S_gauge + S_fermion + S_scalar/topographic + S_charged_current + S_neutral_response + S_scale/RG
claim_boundary: The sector sum is an organizing skeleton, not a single derived local action with fixed coefficients.
evidence_against: no unique variational principle generates and normalizes every sector
evidence_for: compatible boundary, gauge, fermion, scalar, charged-current, neutral, and scale terms are inventoried
